c1_naive_dimensional.assumption: rho_Lambda = Q_max(m) as raw eV^4 objects (bridge O(1)). No velocity/entropy scale inserted.
c1_naive_dimensional.note: This IS the known DE<->neutrino-mass meV coincidence (rho_L^1/4 ~ m_nu scale). Not new ledger content.

a_i_maint_TdS.assumption: E_mode = de Sitter temperature H0/2pi (INSERTED scale); mode density = degenerate fermion; identify Fermi momentum with m.

a_ii_maint_Em_equals_m.assumption: E_mode = m: then rho_L = ln2 * n * m = ln2 * rho_DM. m CANCELS.
a_ii_maint_Em_equals_m.check_ratio: rho_L/(ln2*rho_DM) = 3.735 (should be 1 if link held; observed ratio of rho_L to ln2*rho_DM)
a_ii_maint_Em_equals_m.verdict_window: NO MASS PREDICTED (m cancels); and the density identity misses by the ratio above

b_lnn2_times_nDM.assumption: same as a-ii once an energy/mode is chosen; ln2*n_DM is a number density (eV^3), not an energy density (eV^4) -- needs an inserted eV scale.
b_lnn2_times_nDM.verdict_window: ILL-POSED without inserted scale; reduces to (a).

d_horizon_entropy.assumption: de Sitter horizon entropy = ln2 per DM particle in horizon volume.

e_dwarf_sigma_TG.assumption: insert dwarf sigma~4-10 km/s (Q_obs=rho/sigma^3). This is standard TG; rho_Lambda and the ledger do NOT enter.
e_dwarf_sigma_TG.verdict_window: IN-WINDOW (lower bound) but NOT a ledger prediction -- pure prior art.

verdict.statement: KILL. No non-arbitrary ledger link exists between rho_Lambda and Q_max(m). The ledger emits only dimensionless numbers (ln2/mode, corridor, k_eff<=10); bridging two eV^4 quantities requires an inserted dimensionful scale the ledger does not contain (this is exactly the undetermined kappa of lambda_maintenance_wz 7a). Predicted m spans ~41 orders across the arbitrary scale choices. The only route landing in [0.3,10] keV inserts the dwarf sigma (standard Tremaine-Gunn, zero rho_Lambda content); the only route using rho_Lambda alone reproduces the KNOWN meV DE<->neutrino-mass coincidence, 6 orders below the DM window.

notes.rho_Lambda: STANDARD (Planck2018 Omega_L,h). rho_L^(1/4) reproduces the textbook 2.24 meV.
notes.Qmax_form: STANDARD: Q_max = g m^4 / (2 pi)^{3/2} (natural units, sigma in c). O(1) convention-dependent coefficient; flagged, does not move the verdict.
notes.TG_bound: STANDARD (reproduces literature m>~100-400 eV, Boyarsky2009/DiPaolo2017 robust model-independent bound m>~100 eV from Segue-1/Willman-1).
notes.window: STANDARD: [~0.3, ~10] keV (TG lower / Lyman-alpha upper). Fetched, not rederived.
